Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Beneficiary

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Beneficiary
public class Beneficiary extends Object
Beneficiary

The beneficiary for transfer on death.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Integer>
    beneficiaryPercentage()
    An integer conveying the percentage of interest the related Beneficiary has in the account if the owner(s) become deceased; The sum of all beneficiary percentages must equal "100"
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BeneficiaryBirthDate>
    birthDate()
    The legal day, month, and year of birth for a beneficiary; Birth date is required if tax id and tax id type is not provided.
    static Beneficiary.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<String>
    email()
    Beneficiaries may provide an email, a mailing_address, or both An email address indicated for account communications
    Optional<String>
    entityName()
    The legal entity name; Required if the beneficiary is a legal entity.
    Optional<BeneficiaryEntityType>
    entityType()
    The entity type of the beneficiary; Required if the beneficiary is a legal entity.
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
     
    Optional<String>
    familyName()
    Family name of a natural person; Required if the beneficiary is a natural person.
    Optional<String>
    givenName()
    The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.Required if the beneficiary is a natural person.
    int
    hashCode()
     
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<MailingAddress>
    mailingAddress()
    The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress.
    Optional<String>
    middleNames()
    Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PhoneNumber>
    phoneNumber()
    The phone number for a party; Lives on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person
    Optional<BeneficiaryRelationType>
    relationType()
    The relationship of the beneficiary to the account owner
    Optional<String>
    taxId()
    The full U.S.
    Optional<BeneficiaryTaxIdType>
    taxIdType()
    The nature of the U.S.
    String
    toString()

    An integer conveying the percentage of interest the related Beneficiary has in the account if the owner(s) become deceased; The sum of all beneficiary percentages must equal "100"

  • Method Details

    • beneficiaryPercentage

      public Optional<Integer> beneficiaryPercentage()
      An integer conveying the percentage of interest the related Beneficiary has in the account if the owner(s) become deceased; The sum of all beneficiary percentages must equal "100"

    • birthDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BeneficiaryBirthDate> birthDate()
      The legal day, month, and year of birth for a beneficiary; Birth date is required if tax id and tax id type is not provided.

    • email

      public Optional<String> email()
      Beneficiaries may provide an email, a mailing_address, or both An email address indicated for account communications

    • entityName

      public Optional<String> entityName()
      The legal entity name; Required if the beneficiary is a legal entity.

    • entityType

      public Optional<BeneficiaryEntityType> entityType()
      The entity type of the beneficiary; Required if the beneficiary is a legal entity.

    • familyName

      public Optional<String> familyName()
      Family name of a natural person; Required if the beneficiary is a natural person.

    • givenName

      public Optional<String> givenName()
      The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.Required if the beneficiary is a natural person.

    • mailingAddress

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<MailingAddress> mailingAddress()
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. Required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • middleNames

      public Optional<String> middleNames()
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • phoneNumber

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PhoneNumber> phoneNumber()
      The phone number for a party; Lives on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person

    • relationType

      public Optional<BeneficiaryRelationType> relationType()
      The relationship of the beneficiary to the account owner

    • taxId

      public Optional<String> taxId()
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Tax ID is required if birth date is not provided.

    • taxIdType

      public Optional<BeneficiaryTaxIdType> taxIdType()
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN. Tax id type is required if birth date is not provided.

    • builder

      public static Beneficiary.Builder builder()

      An integer conveying the percentage of interest the related Beneficiary has in the account if the owner(s) become deceased; The sum of all beneficiary percentages must equal "100"

      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. Required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • withMailingAddress

      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. Required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines
